vegan-quesadillas-recipe-step-by-step-co.name: Vegan Quesadillas Recipe Step By Step
vegan-quesadillas-recipe-step-by-step-co.original_name: Receta de quesadillas veganas paso a paso

ingredients.item: 2 cdtas. de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: Stretch tofu at your best, can be small cubes or strips.
Warm up the oil in a frying pan and add the cut tofu and spices. Mix with medium-high heat until tofu gills.

Sobre una de las tortillas en un plato plana, agrega un poco de queso rallado, un poco de tofu y otro poco de queso por encima. Dobla por la mitad. Repite este  paso hasta hacer todas las quesadillas.
Agrega el tomate y aguacate a la quesadilla.
Warm up a frying pan and dorate the quesadilla from both sides, so that the cheese gets better, put a cover to frying pan.
Trocea las quesadillas y sirve.

vegan-ranch-dip.name: Vegan Ranch Dip
instructions: Add the mayo, non-dairy milk, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, pepper, paprika, apple cider vinegar, and lemon juice to a blender or food processor. Blend or pulse until smooth and creamy.
Add the parsley and dill and pulse together until well-blended.
Transfer to a small bowl or serving container and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Serve the ranch with veggies, garnished  with more dill and parsley, if desired.
Enjoy!

vegetable-chips-argiro.name: Vegetable Chips
instructions: Clean raw vegetables.
In mandolin cut into slices very thin, almost transparent, all vegetables.
Place the beet in a bowl and in another bowl all the other vegetables. Add some ice cubes and each bowl.
Fill the bowls with water and let the vegetables stand for 20 minutes.
Then rinse them, drain and dry them very well by spreading them on absorbent paper.
Make sure to spread the vegetables on a layer so that they do not cover each other and dry very well. Tampon the vegetables with paper from the top to dry completely.
Heat the fryer and fry the vegetable chips for 2 minutes until they become crispy for a few minutes.
We make them simple on a tray lined with absorbent paper. Sprinkle with some salt.
They are kept crispy in an airtight box, sealed well for 3-4 days. For crisp chips you must protect them from moisture in the space.

vegetable-quinoa-biryani.name: Vegetable Quinoa Biryani
instructions: Heat avocado oil in a pan. To this, add whole spices like bay leaves, cinnamon sticks, dry chili peppers, cloves and whole cumin seeds.
Once the spices start to sizzle, add the chopped veggies and garlic and ginger.
Add the remainder of the spices and water and mix well.
Cook for about 5 minutes, until veggies have softened and the flavors have incorporated.
In a separate pan, alternate with a bed of quinoa layered with the cooked veggies.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve.
Enjoy!

vegetable-soup-recipe-with-peas-comedera.name: Vegetable Soup Recipe With Peas
vegetable-soup-recipe-with-peas-comedera.original_name: Receta de sopa de verduras con guisantes

ingredients.item: 2  zanahorias medianas (peladas y cortadas en cubos)
1 taza de guisantes congelados o frescos
Hierbas frescas (como perejil o cilantro para decorar)

instructions: Start with your ingredients. Pig onion and garlic, cut carrots and celery into cobbles of a uniform size to ensure a matching cooking.
In a big pot, it heats olive oil with medium heat. Add minced onion and garlic, cooking until translucent, about 3-5 minutes. Be sure you don't burn the garlic, as I could get some soup.
Incorpora las zanahorias y el apio a la olla. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto. Cocina las verduras, revolviendo ocasionalmente, hasta que comiencen a ablandarse, unos 5 minutos.
Swallow the vegetable stock into the pot. Increase the fire till the mixture starts to boil. Then reduce fire and let soup simmer for about 20 minutes or till vegetables are completely tender.
Add the peas to the pot and cook for another 5 minutes, or till they are hot.
Test and tighten the season with more salt and pepper if necessary. Serves hot soup and decorates with fresh herbs for a touch of taste and color.

vegetable-soup-with-savoy-cabbage-telecu.name: Vegetable Soup With Savoy Cabbage
instructions: Peel and roughly cut the onion and turnip, as well as the leek, a carrot and half the cabbage. For the trim, cut the other carrot into thin slices and the rest of the cabbage in julian (cops). Reserve.
Light a pot with the water and let it boil. Add the pieces of vegetables that cut roughly, as well as the beans. Season with salt, stir and let it cook well.

In the end, crush the soup and add the vegetables to the garrison. Add the olive oil, stir and let it cook for another 12 minutes. Retrieve the seasonings and remove from the fire. Serve the soup very hot.

vegetarian-frito-pie.name: Vegetarian Frito Pie

ingredients.prep: guajillo, or Anaheim), stems and seeds removed

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced scallions, sour cream, and thinly sliced jalapeños (for serving; optional)

instructions: Pulse 2 dried chiles (such as New Mexico, guajillo, or Anaheim), stems and seeds removed, 2 Tbsp. dried oregano, and 1 Tbsp. ground cumin in a food processor until finely ground. (Some small pieces of chile are okay.) Transfer spice mix to a small bowl and set aside.
Add ½ cup raw walnuts to processor and pulse until finely ground. Transfer walnuts to another small bowl. Reserve food processor (no need to wash).

Heat 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add 2 large white onions, finely chopped, and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Add walnuts, 8 oz. shiitake or crimini mushrooms, coarsely chopped, and 1 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt and cook, stirring occasionally, until mushrooms release their moisture, about 5 minutes. Add two 14-oz. cans beans (such as pinto, kidney, and/or cannellini), rinsed, reserved spice mix, and 3 cups water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium, and simmer, stirring often, until liquid is reduced by about half, 15–18 minutes.

Meanwhile, pulse 6 garlic cloves, 1–2 jalapeños (depending on your heat preference), halved, seeds removed, one 28-oz. can crushed tomatoes, preferably fire-roasted, 3 Tbsp. soy sauce, and 3 Tbsp. tomato paste in food processor until garlic and jalapeños are finely chopped.
Add tomato mixture to pot with beans and simmer until chili is thickened, 20–25 minutes. Taste and season with freshly ground pepper and more salt if needed.

Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 375°. Spread about three-quarters of one 9.25-oz. bag Fritos in a square baking dish or a pie dish and create a well in the center. Spoon 2 cups chili in the center and top with ¼ cup coarsely grated cheddar and remaining Fritos. Top with 2 more cups chili and scatter ½ cup coarsely grated cheddar evenly over. Bake Frito pie until cheese is melted and chips are slightly toasted, 12–16 minutes.

Scatter remaining ¼ cup coarsely grated cheddar over and top with coarsely chopped cilantro and thinly sliced scallions if desired. Serve with sour cream and thinly sliced jalapeños in bowls on the side for topping if desired.
Do Ahead: Chili can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill, or freeze up to 3 months.

vegetarian-pita-kebab-lezzet.name: Vegetarian Pita Kebab

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon of kimyon, dry blind, pepper, salt

instructions: 1. Take the Bayat pide into a deep container and fill it with water until it will cover it.
2. Wait for water until the pide softened.
3. Softened the water of your pide and tighten well.
4. Take the kneading container.
5. Add Bulguru and start kneading.
6. Close over and wait until half an hour in the room heat for the inflatables enough.
7. After resting the mixture sufficiently, the shakes, salts and spices are thoroughly kneaded.
8. Shredding pieces from the dough of the dough and rolling in your palm.
9. Heat the olive oil in the pan and fry meatball balls.
10. melt the butter into the same ceiling after the frying process is finished.
11. 11. Add cake and pepper and taste, and mix the meatballs you've already fried in this oil slightly.
12. Washed semisis grass with cottage yogurt and spread to the bottom of the serving plate.
12. August Place and serve tiny meatballs that you flavor on butter.

vegetarian-three-bean-chili.name: Vegetarian Three-bean Chili

ingredients.item: Mild or medium chunky corn and tomato salsa

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in large heavy pot over medium-high. Cook salsa, cumin, chili powder, oregano, and garlic powder, stirring, until fragrant and slightly reduced, 1–2 minutes. Add black, pinto, and kidney beans, tomatoes, broth, 3/4 tsp. salt, and 1/4 tsp. pepper. Bring to a simmer, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat to medium and continue to simmer, stirring occasionally, until flavors are blended and chili is thickened, about 15 minutes. Taste and season with salt and pepper, if needed.

Pour oil into a medium skillet to a depth of 1/2". Heat over medium-high until thermometer registers 191°C. Working in 2 batches, fry tortilla strips, turning occasionally, until crisp and pale golden, about 2 minutes per batch. Using a slotted spoon, transfer strips to a paper towel-lined plate or rimmed baking sheet to drain; immediately season with salt.
Ladle chili into bowls. Top with crispy tortilla strips and jalapeños, if using.
Chili can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

vegetarian-wontons-hoanh-thanh-chay.name: Vegetarian Wontons (hoành Thánh Chay)

ingredients.item: . perilla sauce or 2 tbsp. soy sauce

ingredients.prep: or asparagus or green beans, sliced into  0.25-inch pieces

ingredients.item: Pack of shop-bought 3 x 3-inch wonton wrappers

instructions: Preheat your oven to 204°C.
Make the sauce by mixing the ingredients together. Set aside.
Place the cauliflower and sweet potato onto a baking sheet. Drizzle and toss with the oil and bake for 25–25 minutes.

When the vegetables are done, let them cool slightly before roughly mashing the sweet potato in a mixing bowl. Add the cauliflower, edamame, water chestnuts, sushi ginger, and spring onions. Sprinkle with the sea salt and gently fold it altogether with the sesame oil.

To make the dumplings, sprinkle a little cornstarch onto a tray. Place a wonton wrapper onto the palm of your hand and place 1 tablespoon of the filling in the middle. Fold into a triangle and roughly pleat together. Place it on the tray. This technique is great for deep-frying. If you would like to poach the wontons, pleat them into gold sacks by folding into a triangle then pinching inwards until the wrappers gather at the top, before placing the wontons on a tray. Repeat.
To deep-fry: Heat about 2 inches of oil to 160°C in a heavy-bottomed Dutch oven, and fry in batches for about 3 minutes on each side or until blistering and golden. Drain on paper towels.

To poach: Place in a pan of boiling water and poach in batches for 4 minutes, at which point they should float to the top. Leave to poach for another minute before draining and then gently tossing in the sesame oil.
To serve, place on a platter and pour the perilla sauce all over it. Scatter with spring onion.

venezuelan-andean-pinch-recipe-comedera.name: Venezuelan Andean Pinch Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 litro de caldo de pollo (o agua si no tienes caldo)

instructions: It pits the onions and garlic tooth into small pieces and pits into a pot with butter.
Luego de un par de minutos echa el caldo en la olla. Mantenla a fuego alto.
Add potatoes, previously peeled and minced into medium or small cubes.
Also add a liter of milk.
Cuando empiece a hervir, baja un poco el fuego de la cocina.
Let the pope cook, when it's nearly made add the 4 eggs and let them cook pits, that's to say don't remove them so that clear doesn't break.
Once the eggs and potatoes are ready, put out the cheese and some cilantro leaves.
Retira del fuego y deja reposar un par de minutos antes de servir.

venezuelan-sandwich-an-ideal-appetizer-t.name: Venezuelan Sandwich: An Ideal Appetizer To Share Or Have For Breakfast
venezuelan-sandwich-an-ideal-appetizer-t.original_name: Sanduchón venezolano: un aperitivo ideal para compartir o desayunar

ingredients.item: 6  rebanadas grandes de pan de molde sin corteza
1/2  pechuga de pollo cocida y desmenuzada
1 small tin of tuna (optional for a second layer)
3 cdas  de queso crema o ricotta
Leaves of lettuce or ruula to decorate

instructions: Cooking and crumbling chicken, mix with mayonnaise, mustard, salt, pepper and corn.
Also, mix the tuna with mayonnaise and a few drops of lemon.
En una fuente rectangular, coloca una base de pan de molde.
Unta la mezcla de pollo sobre la primera capa.
Add a new layer of bread and cover with a mixture of tuna or cream cheese with pimenton.
Put up a final cape of bread.
Cover the whole Sanducham with a uniform cape of mayonnaise or whipped cream cheese.
Decora con lechuga, rodajas de aguacate, zanahoria rallada y aceitunas.
Refrigera durante al menos 1 hora antes de servir para que se compacte.
It cuts into portions and serves cold.

venison-stuffed-peppers.name: Venison-stuffed Peppers
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a glass baking dish.
Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook and stir onion in hot butter until softened, 3 to 5 minutes. Set aside.

Combine venison, 3/4 cup Cheddar cheese, stuffing mix, garlic powder, black pepper, and salt in a large bowl. Mix until well blended. Add enough cream to create a thick, doughy texture. Add cooked onions and mix until blended.
Arrange bell pepper halves in the prepared baking dish, cut-sides up. Form meat mixture into 8 meatballs using your hands. Stuff meatballs into bell pepper halves in the baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour. Top with remaining 3/4 cup Cheddar cheese and continue baking until cheese is melted and starting to brown, about 15 minutes more.

very-yummy-croutons.name: Very Yummy Croutons
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Drizzle melted butter over bread cubes in a large bowl; toss until butter is completely soaked into bread. Spread bread cubes onto a baking sheet. Sprinkle garlic salt evenly over the cubes.
Bake in preheated oven until golden brown, about 15 minutes. Cool completely before storing in an airtight container.

vietnamese-style-grilled-pork-chops-with.name: Vietnamese-style Grilled Pork Chops With Fresh Herb Salad

ingredients.prep: dark- and pale-green parts only, thinly sliced

ingredients.item: Torn mixed herb leaves (such as thai or sweet basil

instructions: Blend shallot, garlic, brown sugar, fish sauce, soy sauce, oil, and pepper in a blender. Transfer marinade to a large resealable plastic bag. Add pork chop and turn to coat. Seal bag, pressing out air; chill at least 1 hour and up to 12 hours.

Prepare a grill for medium-high heat. (Alternatively, heat a grill pan over medium-high.) Remove pork chops from marinade, letting excess drip back into bag; season both sides with salt. Grill pork chops, turning once, until lightly charred, about 2 minutes per side.
Meanwhile, toss plums, scallions, chile, herbs, bean sprouts, and vinegar in a large bowl. Season with salt; toss again.
Serve pork with salad and lime wedges.

vigil-or-lent-capirotada-recipe-comedera.name: Vigil Or Lent Capirotada Recipe
vigil-or-lent-capirotada-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de capirotada de Vigilia o de Cuaresma
instructions: Let's start by preparing the ingredients. It also prewarmes the oven to 180 been 3.

Inicia la receta y prepara un jarabe con el piloncillo. Para ello, agrega en una olla la panela e incorpora la canela, los clavos y el agua. Cocina a fuego medio y deja que se disuelva hasta formar un jarabe medio cremoso. No dejes de mezclar.
Una vez listo el jarabe, paga y deja reposar.
Posteriormente, mezcla la mantequilla derretida con el aceite.
Luego, toma las rebanadas de pan y con una brocha barnizas cada rodaja den pan y coloca en una charola o bandeja.
Hornea pro aproximadamente 8 minutos hasta que tomen un color dorado y un poco crocante.
Ahora, procede con la receta y coloca una capa de las rebanadas de pan en un refractario de vidrio. Vierte un poco del jarabe del piloncillo hasta que queden remojadas.
Produce and add Feta cheese, pasitas and some peanuts.
Tapa con otra capa de rebanadas de pan y vuelve a verter el jarabe de piloncillo hasta que queden bien remojados los ingredientes.
Feta and peanuts and pasitas. Cover the plate with foil paper and bordnea for about 45 minutes or until the bread remains soft and moist from the syrup and with a golden cape.
Retira el horno, deja reposar y sirve a temperatura ambiente o tibio.
Enjoy!
